examples: In the afternoon, I was surprised that Ren Liman called me suddenly.
Then I heard the movie was going to be directed by Doug Liman and everything changed.
Liman reveals they both had different opinions about one particular scene, and it caused a spat.
Written by the brothers Jez and John Henry Butterworth, and directed by Doug Liman, who shot the movie himself with a jumpy, hand-held camera that creates a war-zone feeling in almost every scene.
